category_sources: source_facts.description: JBIG1 data compression standard implementation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jbigkit; official source_facts.homepage title and project name use JBIG-KIT.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Cambridge-hosted JBIG-KIT project and documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive point to the official distribution page/tarball, with no official source-control repository URL supplied.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify JBIG1 compression command-line tools.
